mapper.insert: insert into usertb(id, name, nickname, pw, wdate, email, phone, grade, social, delyn, banyn, ban_reason) values(null , #{name}, #{nickname}, #{pw}, NOW(), #{email}, #{phone}, "U", "N" , "N", "N", "");
insert into user_termstb (user_id, term_id, agreed, agreed_at, created_at, updated_at) values (#{userId}, #{termId}, #{agreed}, now(), now(), now())
mapper.select: select count(email) from usertb where email = #{email}
select count(phone) from usertb where phone = #{phone}
select * from usertb where name = #{name} and phone = #{phone}
mapper.update: update usertb set pw = #{pw} where email = #{email}
mapper.select: select count(*) from usertb where email = #{email} and name = #{name} and phone = #{phone}
mapper.insert: insert into usertb (name, nickname, pw, wdate, email, social_type, phone, grade, social, delyn, ban_reason, social_id) values (#{nickname}, #{nickname}, SUBSTRING(MD5(RAND()), 1, 5), now(), #{email}, 'kakao', LPAD(FLOOR(RAND() * 100000000000), 11, '0'), 'U', #{social}, 'N', '', #{socialId})

insert into usertb (name, nickname, pw, wdate, email, social_type, phone, grade, social, delyn, ban_reason, social_id) values (#{name}, #{nickname}, SUBSTRING(MD5(RAND()), 1, 5), now(), #{email}, 'naver', LPAD(FLOOR(RAND() * 100000000000), 11, '0'), 'U', #{social}, 'N', '', #{socialId})
mapper.select: select notice_no, title, content, wdate, answeryn from noticetb where user_id = #{userId} and delyn = "n"

select r.reserv_code as reservCode, r.user_id as userId, r.name, r.phone, r.email, r.checkin, r.checkout, r.reserv_date as reservDate, case r.payment when 0 then '계좌이체' when 1 then '카드결제' when 2 then '카카오페이' else '기타' end as payment, r.cancelyn, r.adult_no as adultNo, r.child_no as childNo, rm.name as roomName, u.name as userName from reservtb r join usertb u on r.user_id = u.id join roomtb rm on r.room_no = rm.room_no where r.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update usertb set pw = ${pw} pw = ${pw} pw = ${pw}where email=#{email} and name = #{name} and phone = #{phone}
update usertb set nickname = #{nickname} , phone = #{phone} where id = #{id}
update usertb set pw = SUBSTRING(MD5(RAND()), 1, 16) where email=#{email} and name = #{name} and phone = #{phone}
update reservtb set cancelyn = 'Y' where reserv_code = ${reservCode}
mapper.select: select id, email, phone, delyn, name, banyn, ban_reason, 'USER' as memberType from usertb union all select id, email, phone, delyn, name, banyn, ban_reason, 'BIZ' as memberType from biztb

select * from( select id, email, phone, delyn, name, banyn, ban_reason, 'USER' as memberType from usertb union all select id, email, phone, delyn, name, banyn, ban_reason, 'BIZ' as memberType from biztb ) t where id = #{memberId} and memberType = #{memberType}
mapper.update: update accotb set delyn = #{delyn} where biz_id = #{memberId}
